suggested_invariant.title: Frontend route angular:4b36c6293bf9 must be claimed by ≥1 use-case
suggested_invariant.statement: Route angular:4b36c6293bf9 appears in the routes inventory but is not covered by any use-case in the coverage matrix. Author a use-case that claims this route, or remove the route if it is dead UI.
suggested_invariant.rationale: Unmapped routes are user-facing flows with no traceable specification. Closing the gap is a precondition to release promotion (INV-INVENTORY-001).
